q_en: Which is the best breakfast for someone who always feels bloated?
q_zh: 总是腹胀的人，哪种早餐最好？
a: A. Green smoothie with kale, banana and ice / 绿色冰沙（羽衣甘蓝、香蕉、冰块）
b: B. Rice congee with ginger / 姜味米粥
c: C. Greek yogurt with granola / 希腊酸奶配格兰诺拉麦片
why_en: Raw cold smoothie kills your digestive fire. Yogurt creates dampness. Congee with ginger is warm and easy to digest.
why_zh: 生冷冰沙灭掉消化之火，酸奶生湿。姜粥温暖易消化。

q_en: You always feel cold. Which diet change helps the MOST?
q_zh: 你总是怕冷，哪种饮食改变最有帮助？
a: A. Eat more raw salads for nutrients / 多吃生沙拉补充营养
b: B. Add lamb stew with ginger / 加羊肉姜汤
c: C. Switch to a plant-based protein shake / 改喝植物蛋白奶昔
why_en: Raw salads are cold-natured. Protein shakes are cold and hard to digest. Lamb is the most warming meat in Chinese medicine.
why_zh: 生沙拉性寒。蛋白奶昔寒冷难消化。羊肉是中医最温补的肉类。

q_en: You have acne that won't go away. Which healthy food is making it WORSE?
q_zh: 痘痘一直不好，哪种健康食物让它更严重？
a: A. Skim milk with oatmeal / 脱脂牛奶配燕麦
b: B. Mung bean soup / 绿豆汤
c: C. Almond butter on toast / 杏仁酱涂吐司
why_en: Dairy is the most damp-forming food in Chinese medicine. Damp-heat shows up as acne. Mung beans actually CLEAR heat.
why_zh: 奶制品最生湿。湿热反映为痘痘。绿豆反而清热。

q_en: It is 3 AM and you wake up every night. Which organ is keeping you awake?
q_zh: 你每晚凌晨3点醒来，是哪个器官在作怪？
a: A. Your heart - you are stressed / 心脏 - 你压力太大
b: B. Your liver - its energy peaks 1-3 AM / 肝脏 - 肝气凌晨1-3点最旺
c: C. Your stomach - you ate too late / 胃 - 你吃太晚了
why_en: Chinese medicine has an organ clock. Liver meridian peaks 1-3 AM. Waking then means Liver Qi stagnation from stress.
why_zh: 中医有经络时辰表。肝经凌晨1-3点最旺。此时醒来说明肝气郁结。

q_en: You have dry skin. What actually moisturizes from WITHIN?
q_zh: 皮肤干燥，什么能从体内滋润？
a: A. Drink 8 glasses of cold water / 喝8杯冰水
b: B. Snow fungus soup with rock sugar / 银耳冰糖汤
c: C. Take collagen powder / 喝胶原蛋白粉
why_en: Cold water just passes through. Collagen is processed and cold. Snow fungus generates fluids and moisturizes from inside.
why_zh: 冰水只是穿过身体。胶原蛋白加工过且寒。银耳生津润肺从内滋润。

q_en: You are always hungry even after a big meal. What is happening?
q_zh: 你吃了很多还是一直饿，怎么回事？
a: A. You need more protein / 你需要更多蛋白质
b: B. You have Stomach Heat creating false hunger / 胃热产生假饥饿
c: C. Your metabolism is fast / 新陈代谢太快
why_en: Stomach Heat creates false hunger. You eat but never feel satisfied because heat burns through food too fast. Fix with cooling foods.
why_zh: 胃热产生假饥饿。吃了不满足因为热烧食物太快。需清热食物。

q_en: You cannot fall asleep. Which bedtime snack actually helps?
q_zh: 你睡不着，哪种睡前零食真正有帮助？
a: A. A handful of almonds / 一把杏仁
b: B. Lotus seed and lily bulb soup / 莲子百合汤
c: C. Dark chocolate 70% / 黑巧克力70%
why_en: Dark chocolate has caffeine. Lotus seed calms the Heart and lily bulb nourishes Heart Yin. A classic sleep remedy for centuries.
why_zh: 黑巧克力含咖啡因。莲子安神百合养心阴。经典助眠食疗。

q_en: You are trying to lose weight. Which food is quietly holding you back?
q_zh: 你在减肥，哪种食物在悄悄拖后腿？
a: A. Rice and noodles / 米饭和面条
b: B. Cheese and yogurt / 奶酪和酸奶
c: C. Avocado toast / 牛油果吐司
why_en: Western diets blame carbs. Chinese medicine says dairy creates dampness that your body holds as weight. Rice is easiest to digest.
why_zh: 西方怪碳水。中医说奶制品生湿，湿就是体重。米饭最易消化。

q_en: You have a sore throat. What should you drink?
q_zh: 你喉咙痛，应该喝什么？
a: A. Orange juice for vitamin C / 橙汁补维C
b: B. Pear tea with honey / 梨汤加蜂蜜
c: C. Cold milk to soothe / 冷牛奶润喉
why_en: Orange juice is acidic and irritates. Cold milk creates phlegm. Pear cools and moistens, honey coats and soothes naturally.
why_zh: 橙汁太酸刺激。冷牛奶生痰。梨清热润肺蜂蜜润喉。

q_en: Your hair is thinning. Which food helps the MOST in Chinese medicine?
q_zh: 头发变少，中医说哪种食物最有帮助？
a: A. Protein shakes after gym / 健身后蛋白粉
b: B. Black sesame seeds / 黑芝麻
c: C. Salmon for omega-3 / 三文鱼补omega-3
why_en: Chinese medicine says hair is governed by the Kidneys. Black foods nourish Kidney essence. Black sesame has been used for hair for centuries.
why_zh: 中医说肾主发。黑色食物补肾精。黑芝麻几百年来用于头发。

q_en: You wake up drenched in sweat at night. What is likely the cause?
q_zh: 你夜间盗汗浸透衣服，可能是什么原因？
a: A. Your bedroom is too hot / 卧室太热
b: B. Your body cooling system is low (Yin Deficiency) / 冷却系统不足（阴虚）
c: C. You ate too much spice / 晚餐太辣
why_en: Consistent night sweats with normal room = Yin Deficiency. Your cooling fluid is low so internal heat escapes as sweat.
why_zh: 正常室温下持续盗汗=阴虚。冷却液不足内热以汗逃逸。

q_en: You have PMS mood swings. Which drink actually helps?
q_zh: 你有经前情绪波动，哪种饮料真正有帮助？
a: A. A glass of wine to relax / 一杯酒放松
b: B. Rose petal tea / 玫瑰花茶
c: C. A protein smoothie / 蛋白奶昔
why_en: Wine worsens Liver Qi stagnation which IS the cause of PMS. Rose petal tea moves Liver energy and eases tension.
why_zh: 酒加重肝气郁结即经前情绪根源。玫瑰花茶疏肝理气。

q_en: You have brain fog after lunch every day. What should you eat?
q_zh: 你每天午饭后脑雾，应该吃什么？
a: A. A big raw salad with chicken / 生沙拉配鸡胸
b: B. A bowl of warm millet porridge / 温热小米粥
c: C. A protein bar and iced coffee / 蛋白棒加冰咖啡
why_en: Raw salad and iced coffee need huge digestive energy leaving less for brain. Warm millet digests easily so energy goes to mind.
why_zh: 生沙拉冰咖啡需大量消化能量留给脑的少。温小米粥易消化能量给脑。

q_en: You crave sweets constantly. What does your body actually need?
q_zh: 你一直想吃甜的，身体真正需要什么？
a: A. More protein to feel full / 更多蛋白质
b: B. Sweet potato and red dates / 地瓜和红枣
c: C. A low-sugar protein bar / 低糖蛋白棒
why_en: Sugar cravings mean Spleen is weak. Spleen craves sweet but refined sugar worsens it. Sweet potato is naturally sweet AND strengthens Spleen.
why_zh: 嗜甜=脾虚。脾喜甘但精制糖更虚。地瓜天然甜且健脾。

q_en: You ate too much and feel stuffed. What helps digestion?
q_zh: 你吃撑了，什么帮助消化？
a: A. Cold water to settle the stomach / 冷水压一压
b: B. Ginger tea / 姜茶
c: C. A raw vegetable salad / 生蔬菜沙拉
why_en: Cold water and raw vegetables make Stomach work HARDER. Ginger tea warms digestive fire and moves food through. #1 remedy for overeating.
why_zh: 冷水生蔬菜让胃更累。姜茶温胃气助下行。治吃撑第一食疗。

q_en: You feel anxious and cannot calm down. Which tea helps?
q_zh: 你焦虑无法平静，哪种茶有帮助？
a: A. Coffee to focus your mind / 咖啡集中注意力
b: B. Chrysanthemum tea / 菊花茶
c: C. Green tea for antioxidants / 绿茶抗氧化
why_en: Coffee and green tea both contain caffeine that stimulates Heart and worsens anxiety. Chrysanthemum cools Liver heat and calms the mind.
why_zh: 咖啡绿茶都含咖啡因刺激心加重焦虑。菊花清肝热安神。

q_en: You have period cramps. Which drink helps the MOST?
q_zh: 你有痛经，哪种饮料最有帮助？
a: A. Hot coffee for warmth / 热咖啡取暖
b: B. Ginger brown sugar tea / 红糖姜茶
c: C. Herbal detox tea / 草本排毒茶
why_en: Coffee worsens cramps by constricting blood vessels. Detox teas are cold-natured. Ginger brown sugar tea warms the uterus and improves flow.
why_zh: 咖啡收缩血管加重痛经。排毒茶性寒。红糖姜茶温宫促血流。

q_en: You are always tired even after 8 hours of sleep. What is the issue?
q_zh: 你睡满8小时还是累，问题出在哪？
a: A. You need a better mattress / 需要更好的床垫
b: B. Your Spleen is too weak to make energy / 脾太弱无法产能量
c: C. You should sleep 10 hours / 应该睡10小时
why_en: In Chinese medicine sleep does not create energy. The Spleen creates energy from food. If Spleen is weak no amount of sleep fixes it.
why_zh: 中医认为睡眠不产能量。脾从食物产能量。脾虚睡再多也累。

q_en: You want to eat for healthy aging. Which should be your DAILY food?
q_zh: 你想吃出抗衰老，哪种应该每天吃？
a: A. Blueberry smoothie bowl / 蓝莓冰沙碗
b: B. Goji berries in warm water / 温水泡枸杞
c: C. Kale chips / 羽衣甘蓝脆片
why_en: Smoothie bowls are cold and raw. Kale chips are dry. Goji berries nourish Liver and Kidney essence, the foundation of healthy aging.
why_zh: 冰沙碗生冷。甘蓝脆片偏燥。枸杞养肝肾精，抗衰基础。

q_en: You feel heavy and sluggish all the time. What should you cut FIRST?
q_zh: 你总是觉得沉重迟钝，应该先减什么？
a: A. Cut all carbohydrates / 戒所有碳水
b: B. Cut dairy and cold drinks / 减奶制品和冷饮
c: C. Cut all fats / 戒所有脂肪
why_en: Heavy and sluggish = dampness. Dairy and cold drinks are the #1 damp-forming foods. Cutting carbs or fats does not remove dampness.
why_zh: 沉重迟钝=湿气。奶制品冷饮第一生湿。戒碳水脂肪不祛湿。
